title: syringa × nanceiana
intro: Syringa × nanceiana, also known as the Nancea lilac, is a hybrid plant species within the Syringa genus. It is a deciduous shrub native to China, known for its fragrant, pale purple flowers and heart-shaped leaves. The medicinal properties of Syringa × nanceiana include its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be attributed to its flavonoid and terpenoid content. The plant's herbal preparations, such as infusions and decoctions, have been used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various health issues, including fever, cough, and digestive problems, offering health benefits like relieving respiratory issues and boosting the immune system.
